notes: A breakup song. The final stanza IS the song's thesis: four 'maybe' lines + the title landing. AUDITED 2026-04-20: first three 'maybes' become ribbons (ascending emphasis carries the escalation, directional lanes alternate amber/cyan which reads as the ambivalence itself). Kept the doubt-turn and the title landing as keys — two moments, not five.

chunks.note: Maybe I've finally let go. #3 ribbon (biggest of the aspirationals)
Or maybe the truth is hard to tell — the doubt-turn, KEY, cooler
And maybe this is just as well. — title landing, KEY, both signals accept
